task_description: Build a complete brochure-style personal website for Ryan Cormack using Astro with light/dark theme, showcasing experience, GitHub projects, YouTube talks, Medium blog, and professional achievements.

verification.summary: npm run build completes successfully (768ms). Built index.html contains all 6 section IDs (hero, about, experience, projects, talks, blog), YouTube links, Medium links, GitHub repository links, and theme toggle functionality. All 10 source files are well-structured with consistent styling patterns, responsive design, and proper accessibility attributes.
